summary: Agents Live Mode System testing complete. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend /agents page loads correctly with 4 agent cards showing real data, LIVE badge visible, View Signals modal shows 12 real signals, Configure modal works with all form elements.
critical_code_review_comments: Agents API correctly returns 4 agents with real metrics from MongoDB
Demo mode toggle works correctly with admin_key authentication
Agent signals endpoint returns real signals with proper structure (symbol, signal_type, confidence, price_at_signal, analysis)
Portfolio endpoints (performance, trades, summary) all functional and demo-mode aware
Frontend AgentsPage correctly fetches from /api/agents and displays LIVE badge when demo mode OFF
Whale Tracker and Volatility Engine show 0 signals - expected due to CoinGecko rate limits as noted in context
seed_data_creation: None - used existing agent data from background workers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agents Live Mode fully tested and working. 4 agents (Momentum Scanner, Sentiment Analyzer, Whale Tracker, Volatility Engine) are running as background workers. Momentum Scanner has 12 signals, Sentiment Analyzer has 44 signals. Whale Tracker and Volatility Engine have 0 signals due to CoinGecko rate limits - this is expected. Demo mode is currently OFF. Key endpoints: GET /api/agents, GET /api/agents/{id}/signals, PUT /api/agents/{id}/config, GET /api/signals/live, GET /api/portfolio/performance, GET /api/portfolio/trades, GET /api/portfolio/summary, GET /api/demo-mode/status, POST /api/admin/demo-mode?admin_key=alphaai_admin_2026.

tests_executed.test: GET /api/agents demo mode returns demo data

mocked_apis_list: Demo mode endpoints return synthetic data when DEMO_MODE=true
mocked_apis.note: When demo mode is ON, /api/agents, /api/signals/live, and /api/portfolio/* return synthetic demo data. When OFF, they return real data from MongoDB.
